cancelled_application_capacity_leak.human_reasoning: Mock API does not release reserved capacity on cancel. Confirmed breach.

closed_case_funding.human_reasoning: API correctly rejects funding for closed/settled cases at application stage.

disburse_without_attorney_ack.human_reasoning: Disbursement blocked without attorney acknowledgment. No breach.

duplicate_funding.human_reasoning: Duplicate application correctly rejected with 409. No breach.

exceeds_case_max_exposure.human_reasoning: Approve endpoint does not re-check max exposure. Confirmed over-exposure.

float_payoff.human_reasoning: Mock API returns total_cents as float. INV-11 violation confirmed.

interest_day_count_basis.human_reasoning: API uses 30-day month approximation instead of exact calendar days.

interest_from_application_date.human_reasoning: Interest accrues from application_date not disbursement_date. Overcharge confirmed.

lien_balance_exceeds_billed.human_reasoning: API accepts lien with balance > original_billed. Overbilling allowed.

negative_plaintiff_remainder.human_reasoning: Settlement produces negative remainder. Platform should block this.

usury_rate_cap.human_reasoning: Contract rate exceeds state usury cap. Regulatory violation.

waterfall_priority.human_reasoning: Medicare paid after medical liens despite super-priority. Liability confirmed.
